HomePage.title: Enes HAN Portfolio
HomePage.intro: Full-stack developer focused on modern web applications.

Metadata.title: Enes HAN | Portfolio
Metadata.description: Welcome to my portfolio. I am Enes HAN, a full-stack developer based in Germany.

Hero.description: I am Enes HAN, a full-stack developer experienced with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I build user-friendly, high-performance web applications.

Skills.title: Building apps with modern technologies.
Skills.subtitle: Always close to what is current.

Encryption.description: Secure, high-performance web applications are my priority.

hanmarktApp.description: A modern market app built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, designed to present products with a clean and fast shopping experience.

todoApp.description: A modern task management app with TypeScript, a clear interface, and a fast, reactive user experience.

medikamenteApp.description: A practical medication tracking app for daily use, built with TypeScript.

calculatorApp.description: A compact calculator app for everyday calculations with focused controls and a clean interface.

weatherApp.description: A weather app that presents current weather data clearly and keeps key information easy to access.

guessApp.description: A visitor comment app built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Blob Storage for saving and managing messages.

periodTrackerApp.description: A period tracker app that helps women follow their menstrual cycles and access important information.
